action: Block PR #247 merge. Remediate SQL injection in user search endpoint and remove hardcoded Stripe API key from config.
rationale: SQL injection in search.py:47 allows unauthenticated database read of all user records. Hardcoded API key in config.py:12 will be committed to repository history.

findings.description: SQL query constructed via string concatenation with unsanitized user input
findings.remediation: Use parameterized query: cursor.execute('SELECT * FROM users WHERE name = %s', (user_input,))

findings.description: Hardcoded Stripe live API key: STRIPE_SECRET_KEY = 'sk_live_...'
findings.remediation: Move to environment variable: STRIPE_SECRET_KEY = os.getenv('STRIPE_SECRET_KEY')

key_findings: SQL injection in api/search.py:47 — unauthenticated full database read
Hardcoded Stripe live API key in config/settings.py:12
